'''gavoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fmol|fmol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fmol|fmol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gavoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæveteth|gæveteth]] || [[word:gævetej|gævetej]] || [[word:gævetesh|gævetesh]] || [[word:gævete|gævete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gavovototh|gavovototh]] || [[word:gavovotoj|gavovotoj]] || [[word:gavovotosh|gavovotosh]] || [[word:gavovoto|gavovoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gavototh|gavototh]] || [[word:gavotoj|gavotoj]] || [[word:gavotosh|gavotosh]] || [[word:gavoto|gavoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gavoftoth|gavoftoth]] || [[word:gavoftoj|gavoftoj]] || [[word:gavoftosh|gavoftosh]] || [[word:gavoftof|gavoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gavototho|gavototho]] || [[word:gavotojo|gavotojo]] || [[word:gavotosho|gavotosho]] || [[word:gavotoko|gavotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gavototh|gavototh]] || [[word:gavotoj|gavotoj]] || [[word:gavotosh|gavotosh]] || [[word:gavoto|gavoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gavotothol|gavotothol]] || [[word:gavotojol|gavotojol]] || [[word:gavotoshol|gavotoshol]] || [[word:gavotokol|gavotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gavotothotho|gavotothotho]] || [[word:gavotojojo|gavotojojo]] || [[word:gavotoshosho|gavotoshosho]] || [[word:gavotoko|gavotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gavotothon|gavotothon]] || [[word:gavotojon|gavotojon]] || [[word:gavotoshon|gavotoshon]] || [[word:gavotokon|gavotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gavotothoro|gavotothoro]] || [[word:gavotojoro|gavotojoro]] || [[word:gavotoshoro|gavotoshoro]] || [[word:gavotokoro|gavotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
